trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all three momentum signals aligned — MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, and RSI at 56.7 in the sweet spot with room to run before overbought territory.
Score 95 with MACD bullish crossover and rising histogram; RSI 63 in healthy momentum zone and price well above SMA-20, giving crypto/digital asset exposure as a diversifier.

decisions.briefing: Markets slipped modestly today with NASDAQ off 0.8% and S&P 500 down 0.5% — a soft but not alarming session. We have five open slots and $1,173 in idle cash, so sitting out entirely would leave too much on the bench. Deploying into BEAM and GLXY, the two cleanest score-95 setups where RSI hasn't reached overbought yet, to put capital to work without chasing extended names.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities pulled back modestly on Tuesday as investors remained cautious ahead of key earnings and macro data releases. Tech led losses on the NASDAQ, weighed by ongoing uncertainty around trade policy and its effect on corporate margins. The mild selling was orderly rather than panicked, with breadth mixed and no single sector dominating the decline.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週二小幅回落，投資者在重要企業財報及宏觀數據公佈前保持謹慎。那斯達克指數受科技板塊拖累領跌，貿易政策不確定性持續壓制市場情緒，令外界擔憂企業利潤率受波及。整體跌勢平穩有序，並非恐慌性拋售，市場寬度表現分化，未見單一板塊主導跌勢。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already trending upward — on the theory that assets with recent strength tend to keep rising in the short term. Indicators like RSI in the 55–70 zone and a MACD bullish crossover are classic momentum signals. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply, so stop-losses are essential when using this strategy.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資是指買入已呈上升趨勢的股票，其背後邏輯是近期表現強勢的資產往往在短期內延續漲勢。RSI處於55至70區間、MACD出現黃金交叉，均是典型的動量訊號。此策略的風險在於動量可能急速逆轉，因此設置止損單至關重要。
